Short CV

Harun TÜRKMENOĞLU graduated from Selçuk University, Department of Public Relations and Publicity, in 2003. In 2013, he completed his Master’s degree in the Advertising and Publicity Program at Selçuk University. In 2017, TÜRKMENOĞLU also completed his PhD in the Department of Graphic Design at Gazi University. He is currently serving as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Cartoon and Animation at the Faculty of Communication.
